name.description: Display name of the store / merchant

slug.description: URL-friendly identifier (lowercase, hyphens only). Stored separately from name; renames must keep the same slug.

aliases.description: Alternate spellings or nicknames (e.g. 'Bloomies') for search/typo tolerance.

categories.description: Reward categories (must exist in categories.yaml) the store maps to. Primary first. Drives card matching.

logo.description: Filename of the merchant logo (optional). Maintainer-only — do not accept user-submitted logos due to trademark risk.

parent_company.description: Parent/holding company (e.g. 'Macy's, Inc.' for Bloomingdale's). Used for cross-linking, not card matching.

co_brand_cards.description: Slugs of co-branded cards from data/cards/. Always rendered first on the page. Build fails if a slug doesn't exist.

also_earns.description: Cards with merchant-specific bonuses NOT captured by category matching (e.g. Apple Card 3% at Nike via Apple Pay).

intro.description: Distinctive merchant intro (1-2 paragraphs). Min 200 chars to discourage templated submissions and avoid Google's doorway-page penalty.

faq.description: Optional FAQ entries; rendered with FAQPage JSON-LD on the page.
